projectDescription: A comprehensive cheat sheet of Android interview questions and answers covering Kotlin, Coroutines, Flow, Android core, Jetpack, architecture, design patterns, libraries, testing, and Java.
keyFeatures: Comprehensive Kotlin and Kotlin Coroutines interview questions with answers
Kotlin Flow API topics including StateFlow, SharedFlow, and operators
Android core concepts: Activity/Fragment lifecycle, Views, Services, Intents
Jetpack components: ViewModel, LiveData, WorkManager, Navigation
Android architecture patterns: MVVM, MVI, Clean Architecture
Popular Android libraries: Retrofit, OkHttp, Dagger/Hilt, Glide
Android System Design questions for senior roles
Unit testing with Coroutines, Flow, Mockito, Espresso
Java OOP, concurrency, and memory management questions
Jetpack Compose fundamentals and state management
publicApiSurface: Kotlin Coroutines: launch, async, withContext, suspend, Flow
Android Activity lifecycle: onCreate, onStart, onResume, onPause, onStop, onDestroy
Android Fragment lifecycle and backstack management
RxJava operators: map, flatMap, zip, merge, concat
Jetpack Compose: Composable, State, remember, recomposition
